data.title: Safe-Haven Flows Keep Gold and Silver Supported as Bitcoin Faces Demand Headwinds
data.description:
Precious metals are holding firm on defensive inflows, while Bitcoin’s upside remains capped by weak demand and pressure from short-term holders.
source: https://btcusa.com/safe-haven-flows-keep-gold-and-silver-supported-as-bitcoin-faces-demand-headwinds/

data.title: US To Impose Tariffs On Chinese Chip Imports By Mid-2027
data.description:
US government announced that it will slap tariffs on ​Chinese chip imports over Beijing's "unreasonable" pursuit of chip industry dominance, ‌but would delay the action until June 2027.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/special-reports/us-to-impose-tariffs-on-chinese-chip-imports-by-mid-2027/

data.title: Grayscale Predicts Bitcoin All-Time High in First Half of 2026 as Institutional Era Begins
data.description:
Grayscale has outlined a bullish outlook for Bitcoin, projecting that the asset will reach a new all-time high in the first half of 2026.
source: https://zycrypto.com/grayscale-predicts-bitcoin-all-time-high-in-first-half-of-2026-as-institutional-era-begins/

data.title: Gnosis announces hard fork to recover funds from Balancer exploit
data.description:
The hard fork on Monday followed a majority of Gnosis validators adopting a soft fork in response to a November Balancer exploit, in which about $116 million in crypto was stolen.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/gnosis-hard-fork-balancer-exploit?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: XRP Takes Hit as Whales Sell 1 Billion Coins, But Pro-Ripple Attorney Says XRP Will ‘Shock the World in 2026’
data.description:
XRP is under pressure as broad market weakness and aggressive whale selling push the crypto into a deeper short-term decline. Several factors are weighing on price action. For one, […]

data.title: If 2026 brings an alteason, will ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL and DOGE be the top performers?
data.description:

source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/if-2026-brings-alteason-will-eth-bnb-xrp-sol-and-doge-outperform?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Solana (SOL) Under Pressure Despite ETF Inflows as Traders Watch $110 Support Zone
data.description:
Solana (SOL) has entered the final stretch of 2025 under sustained pressure, caught between a weakening price structure and signs of steady institutional interest. Related Reading: Dogecoin: Why This One Price Level Is Drawing All the Attention Following a sharp 39% decline in the fourth quarter, SOL is struggling to regain momentum, trading in the low-$120 range as traders focus on whether key support levels can be sustained. The contrast between falling network activity and continued inflows into investment products has left the market divided on what comes next. While ETF-linked demand suggests confidence in Solana’s longer-term relevance, near-term price action remains fragile
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/solana/solana-sol-under-pressure-despite-etf-inflows-as-traders-watch-110-support-zone/
